items.text:
Spring Break Library Hours

The Anderson Library will operate on reduced hours from March 14 to March 20. The main reading room will be open daily from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. A $5 late fee applies to any item returned after March 21. Questions may be directed to Ms. Park.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what is the daily closing time during spring break?
questions.explanation: The notice states that the main reading room will be open daily from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM during spring break.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about items returned on March 22?

options.A: A penalty payment is required for the late return.
options.B: A renewal request must be submitted in advance.
options.C: A staff member will accept the items without charge.
options.D: A waiver covers items returned during the break.

questions.explanation: The notice states that a $5 late fee applies to any item returned after March 21, so a return on March 22 incurs a penalty payment.

items.text:
Subject: Resume Review Appointment

Hi Marcus,

We've scheduled your resume review with Ms. Chen for Thursday, April 6 at 2:30 PM in Career Services, Room 215. Please bring two printed copies of your current resume.

Thanks,
Career Services

questions.stem: According to the email, what day is the appointment scheduled?
questions.explanation: The email states that the appointment is scheduled for Thursday, April 6 at 2:30 PM.

questions.stem: According to the email, what must Marcus bring to the appointment?

options.A: A printed transcript and reference letters
options.B: A digital portfolio on a personal laptop
options.C: Two printed copies of his current resume
options.D: A signed letter from his academic advisor

questions.explanation: The email instructs Marcus to bring two printed copies of his current resume to the appointment.

items.text:
Subject: Office Hours Change This Week

Hi Jordan,

My office hours this week have moved to Wednesday, 3:00–4:30 PM in Bingham Hall, Room 304. The usual Friday slot will not be available this week.

Best,
Dr. Hayes

questions.stem: According to the email, when will Dr. Hayes be available this week?
questions.explanation: The email indicates that office hours have moved to Wednesday from 3:00 to 4:30 PM.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Dr. Hayes's normal schedule?

options.A: Friday afternoons are typically used for student consultations.
options.B: Wednesday afternoons are typically reserved for faculty meetings.
options.C: Office hours typically rotate between two different buildings.
options.D: Office hours typically occur in the morning every week.

questions.explanation: The email notes that the usual Friday slot will not be available, implying that Friday is normally when Dr. Hayes holds office hours.

items.text:
Elevator Service Notice

The west elevator in Stratton Hall will be out of service from May 8 to May 12 for scheduled maintenance. The east elevator and stairwells remain available. A $10 replacement fee applies to any access card lost during the period.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what alternative is available during the outage?

options.A: A pedestrian ramp from the loading dock
options.B: The east elevator and the stairwells
options.C: A shuttle bus from the parking garage
options.D: The freight elevator on the lower level

questions.explanation: The notice states that the east elevator and stairwells remain available during the maintenance period.

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the notice?

options.A: Maintenance will affect both elevators simultaneously.
options.B: Building access requires a card during the maintenance period.
options.C: The west elevator will resume service after May 12.
options.D: Stair access is restricted to upper floors only.

questions.explanation: Since the west elevator will be out of service from May 8 to May 12, it is reasonable to infer that it will return to service after that period.
